name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ turn' = turn + 1
          /\ turn' <= N
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "critical"]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Coordinator is a single process *)
Coordinator == 1

(* Message types *)
MessageType == {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}

(* Message structure: [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in MessageType] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in MessageType]

(* All possible messages *)
AllMessages == [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in MessageType]

(* Initial state: all participants are in state "Init", coordinator is in state "Start", no messages in transit *)
Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ coordinator = "Start"
        /\ messages = {}

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
CoordinatorSendPrepare == /\ coordinator = "Start"
                        /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare"] : p \in Participants }
                        /\ coordinator' = "WaitingForVotes"

(* Participants receive Prepare and vote yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes == /\ \E p \in Participants : /\ participants[p] = "Init"
                                   /\ \E m \in messages : /\ m.sender = Coordinator
                                                          /\ m.receiver = p
                                                          /\ m.type = "Prepare"
                                   /\ messages' = messages \ { m }
                                   /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "VoteYes"]
                                   /\ messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> "VoteYes"] }

(* Participants receive Prepare and vote no *)
ParticipantVoteNo == /\ \E p \in Participants : /\ participants[p] = "Init"
                                  /\ \E m \in messages : /\ m.sender = Coordinator
                                                     /\ m.receiver = p
                                                     /\ m.type = "Prepare"
                                  /\ messages' = messages \ { m }
                                  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "VoteNo"]
                                  /\ messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> "VoteNo"] }

(* Coordinator receives all VoteYes and sends Commit *)
CoordinatorSendCommit == /\ coordinator = "WaitingForVotes"
                        /\ \A p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VoteYes"
                        /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit"] : p \in Participants }
                        /\ coordinator' = "Committed"

(* Coordinator receives any VoteNo and sends Abort *)
CoordinatorSendAbort == /\ coordinator = "WaitingForVotes"
                       /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VoteNo"
                       /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort"] : p \in Participants }
                       /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"

(* Participants receive Commit and transition to "Committed" *)
ParticipantCommit == /\ \E p \in Participants : /\ participants[p] = "VoteYes"
                                   /\ \E m \in messages : /\ m.sender = Coordinator
                                                          /\ m.receiver = p
                                                          /\ m.type = "Commit"
                                   /\ messages' = messages \ { m }
                                   /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]

(* Participants receive Abort and transition to "Aborted" *)
ParticipantAbort == /\ \E p \in Participants : /\ participants[p] = "VoteNo"
                                   /\ \E m \in messages : /\ m.sender = Coordinator
                                                          /\ m.receiver = p
                                                          /\ m.type = "Abort"
                                   /\ messages' = messages \ { m }
                                   /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ CoordinatorSendPrepare
      \/ ParticipantVoteYes
      \/ ParticipantVoteNo
      \/ CoordinatorSendCommit
      \/ CoordinatorSendAbort
      \/ ParticipantCommit
      \/ ParticipantAbort

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \in [Participants -> {"Init", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
          /\ coordinator \in {"Start", "WaitingForVotes", "Committed", "Aborted"}
          /\ messages \subseteq AllMessages

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[f] = p means fork f is held by philosopher p; forks[f] = -1 means free *)
(* States: states[p] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

Init == /\ forks = [f \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [p \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

LeftFork(p) == IF p = 1 THEN N ELSE p - 1
RightFork(p) == IF p = N THEN 1 ELSE p + 1

Hungry(p) == states[p] = "hungry"
Eating(p) == states[p] = "eating"
Thinking(p) == states[p] = "thinking"

Free(f) == forks[f] = -1

CanEat(p) == /\ Free(LeftFork(p))
           /\ Free(RightFork(p))

TakeForks(p) == /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = p,
                                      ![RightFork(p)] = p]
           /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]

PutForks(p) == /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = -1,
                                      ![RightFork(p)] = -1]
           /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]

HungryToHungry(p) == /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]

Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          (Hungry(p) /\ CanEat(p) /\ TakeForks(p))
        \/ (Eating(p) /\ PutForks(p))
        \/ (Thinking(p) /\ HungryToHungry(p))

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
        /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
        /\ \A p \in 1..N : forks[LeftFork(p)] = forks[RightFork(p)] = -1
           \/ forks[LeftFork(p)] = forks[RightFork(p)] = p
           \/ forks[LeftFork(p)] = forks[RightFork(p)] = -1
           \/ forks[LeftFork(p)] = forks[RightFork(p)] = -1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF j = i THEN 0 ELSE num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an element *)
Enqueue(e) == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, e)
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeue an element *)
Dequeue == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ q' = Tail(q)
  /\ tail' = tail

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
  \E e \in 1..K : Enqueue(e) \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ \E term \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = term
       /\ votedFor' = {}
       /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ votedFor' = Append(votedFor, "self")
     /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> ==
